name: yalexs-ble

metadata.name: yalexs-ble
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: Bluetooth control of Yale and August locks

documentation:
# Yale Access BLE

Bluetooth control of Yale and August locks ## Installation Install this via pip (or your favourite package manager): `pip install yalexs-ble` ## Fork history Thanks to: https://github.com/Friendly0Fire/augustpy https://github.com/terrcin/augustctl https://github.com/ethitter/augustctl https://github.com/robson83/augustctl ## Contributors ✨ Thanks goes to these wonderful people ([emoji key](https://allcontributors.org/docs/en/emoji-key)): This project follows the [all-contributors](https://github.com/all-contributors/all-contributors) specification. Contributions of any kind welcome! ## Credits This package was created with [Cookiecutter](https://github.com/audreyr/cookiecutter) and the [browniebroke/cookiecutter-pypackage](https://github.com/browniebroke/cookiecutter-pypackage) project template.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.const.LockInfo.door_sense
documentation: Check if the lock has door sense support.

classes.name: yalexs_ble.const.YaleXSBLEDiscovery
documentation: A validated discovery of a Yale XS BLE device.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.util.serial_to_local_name
documentation: Convert a serial to a local name.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.util.local_name_to_serial
documentation: Convert a local name to a serial.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.util.is_key_error
documentation: Check if the error likely due to the wrong key.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.util.is_disconnected_error
documentation: Check if the error is a disconnected error.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.util.unique_id_from_device_adv
documentation: Get the unique id from the advertisement.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.util.unique_id_from_local_name_address
documentation: Get the unique id from the advertisement.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.util.local_name_is_unique
documentation: Check if the local name is unique.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.util.ValidatedLockConfig.local_name
documentation: Get the local name from the serial.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.session.Session.build_operation_command
documentation: Build a command to send to the lock.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.lock.raise_if_not_connected
documentation: Define a wrapper to raise if we are not connected to the lock.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.lock.Lock._parse_lock_and_door_state
documentation: Parse the lock and door state from the response.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.lock.Lock._parse_lock_status
documentation: Parse the lock state from the response.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.lock.Lock._parse_door_status
documentation: Parse the door state from the response.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.lock.Lock._parse_battery_state
documentation: Parse the battery state from the response.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.lock.Lock.is_connected
documentation: Return True if the lock is connected.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.push.operation_lock
documentation: Define a wrapper to only allow a single operation at a time.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.push.retry_bluetooth_connection_error
documentation:
Define a wrapper to retry on bleak error.

The accessory is allowed to disconnect us any time so
we need to retry the operation.

functions.name: yalexs_ble.push.get_homekit_state_num
documentation: Get the homekit state number from the manufacturer data.

variables.name: yalexs_ble.push.KEEP_ALIVE_TIME
documentation: Lock will disconnect after 30 seconds of inactivity

classes.name: yalexs_ble.push.AuthFailureHistory

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.AuthFailureHistory.auth_failed
documentation: Increment the number of auth failures.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.AuthFailureHistory.auth_success
documentation: Reset the number of auth failures.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.AuthFailureHistory.should_raise
documentation: Return if we should raise an error.
Track the number of auth failures.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock.name
documentation: Get the name of the lock.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock.address
documentation: Get the address of the lock.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock.is_connected
documentation: Return if the lock is connected.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock.set_name
documentation: Set the name of the lock.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock.register_callback
documentation: Register a callback to be called when the lock state changes.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock._disconnected_callback
documentation: Handle a disconnect from the lock.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock._time_since_last_operation
documentation: Return the time since the last operation.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock._disconnect_with_timer
documentation:
Disconnect from device.

This should only ever be called from _reset_disconnect_timer

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock._ensure_connected
documentation: Ensure connection to device is established.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock._get_current_state
documentation: Get the current state of the lock.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock._schedule_future_update_with_debounce
documentation: Schedule an update with a potential debounce.

methods.name: yalexs_ble.push.PushLock._schedule_future_update
documentation: Schedule an update in future seconds.
